response.original_title: Sebuah Dongeng Tentang Bumi dan Bulan
response.overview: A mother tells a fairy tale about the Moon Warrior who must save the Earth by accepting and refusing his requests according to his pact with the Star Devil, while in the real world she prepares to sacrifice her life through a heart donation to save her child, realizing that the greatest love is letting go.
response.title: Sebuah Dongeng Tentang Bumi dan Bulan
